who: HR finance managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 labor cost reports weekly
offer: For HR finance managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 labor cost reports weekly, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We simplify report generation instead of manual compilation of reports using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent and delayed labor cost reporting
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR finance managers
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to HR finance managers with demo video
Community forums where HR finance managers share tools
try_it: Let users try Weekly report generation and Email notifications for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
